creator: jungleji@gmail.com
text:
Booting the installer disc1, select "default", after display hard disk
message, the kernel is looped in following message:

acd0: TIMEOUT - READ_BIG retrying left 1
acd0: TIMEOUT - READ_BIG retrying left 0

If select "disable ACPI" or "Safe", kernel is crash.

The amd64 6.3 installer disc1 works fine.

How-To-Repeat: Same as above.
